name: Our Whisper
description: Our Whisper is a private digital sanctuary designed for married Muslim couples to enrich their relationships. By combining personal mood tracking (Heart Compass) with real-time verse sharing, daily spiritual trackers, private secret vaults, and a shared memory timeline, it guides couples to cultivate Mawaddah (love) and Rahmah (mercy). Powered by Ruh, our AI spiritual counselor, couples can easily consult text-based guidance while building lasting habits and strengthening their faith.
